title: Event Dispatcher: Script and Package Event Execution
interaction_flow: EventDispatcher::dispatchScript() → EventDispatcher::doDispatch(new ScriptEvent(eventName, composer, io, devMode))
Installer::doInstall() → InstallationManager::execute(localRepo, operations, devMode, runScripts, downloadOnly)
InstallationManager → EventDispatcher::dispatchPackageEvent(PRE_PACKAGE_INSTALL | PRE_PACKAGE_UPDATE | PRE_PACKAGE_UNINSTALL, devMode, repo, allOperations, operation)
EventDispatcher::dispatchPackageEvent() → doDispatch(new PackageEvent(eventName, composer, io, devMode, localRepo, operations, operation))
InstallationManager → installer.install(repo, op) | update(repo, op) | uninstall(repo, op)
EventDispatcher::getListeners() → getScriptListeners(event) [reads package.getScripts() from composer.json, checks COMPOSER_SKIP_SCRIPTS env]
[@scriptName] isComposerScript → new ScriptEvent(scriptName, ...), setOriginatingEvent(event) → dispatch(scriptName, scriptEvent) [recursive]
[ClassName::method] isPhpScript → makeAutoloader() → executeEventPhpScript(className, methodName, event) → ClassName::methodName($event)
[SomeCommand] isCommandClass → new Application(), app.add(new $className()), app.run(StringInput(args), output)
[shell cmd] → resolve @php / @putenv / binary, executeTty(exec) via ProcessExecutor
EventDispatcher::doDispatch() → popEvent() [finally block, also fixes autoloader registration order]
PluginManager::addPlugin(plugin) → if plugin instanceof EventSubscriberInterface → EventDispatcher::addSubscriber(plugin)
key_relationships: EventDispatcher reads CompletePackage::getScripts() via Composer::getPackage() for script listeners
EventDispatcher uses AutoloadGenerator::buildPackageMap/parseAutoloads/createLoader to bootstrap autoloading before PHP script invocation
callable_types_in_doDispatch: PHP callable (object method) — called directly after makeAutoloader
Composer script alias (@scriptName) — recursive dispatch via ScriptEvent with setOriginatingEvent
@composer command — shell exec via getPhpExecCommand() + COMPOSER_BINARY
PHP static method (ClassName::methodName) — executeEventPhpScript after makeAutoloader
Symfony Command class (ends with 'Command') — Symfony Application::run with StringInput
Shell command — executeTty via ProcessExecutor (@php, @putenv handled specially)
important_notes: runScripts flag on both Installer and EventDispatcher; if false, no script listeners are loaded from composer.json
Circular event dispatch detected in pushEvent(): throws RuntimeException
COMPOSER_SKIP_SCRIPTS env var can suppress specific script names
COMPOSER_DEBUG_EVENTS env var enables verbose dispatch logging
Post-package events (POST_PACKAGE_*) are deferred to postExecCallbacks array, called after all promises resolve
Autoloader is regenerated (makeAutoloader) before PHP script invocation using AutoloadGenerator; result cached by SHA-256 hash of installed packages
Script listeners from composer.json merged at priority=0 with registered listeners
